programs.title: 90 Day: The Single Life
programs.sub_title: Between the Sheets: The Act of Orbiting
programs.desc: The cast is shocked when they see Courtney's new man, and her old one, living under the same roof; Kim continues to get to know Wayne while navigating a fight with Jamal; never-before-seen footage with Liz and Villa leads to spicy sex talk in-studio.

programs.title: 7 Little Johnstons
programs.sub_title: He's Low-Key Chopping Down a Tree
programs.desc: Amber and Emma surprise Liz with a bridal shower. Jonah and Alex help Brice get over his fear of public speaking. Trent cuts down a tree in the backyard, but concerns rise as he begins having heart palpitations. The family experiences a devastating loss.

programs.title: 90 Day: The Single Life
programs.desc: In the UK, Kim and Jamal argue about revealing her secrets to Wayne; Colt recovers from surgery while living with Cortney and her new boyfriend; Pedro blows up after discovering Sophie kissed her date; Vanja breaks her celibacy and meets Tony's parents.

programs.title: Unexpected
programs.sub_title: Giving Birth Was Supposed to Be a Happy Thing
programs.desc: Jenna's mom worries about the relationship with Aden, prompting Jenna to talk to Aden; Lilly and Lawrence tour a wedding venue; Tiarra arrives in Kentucky for Ella's birthday; Emersyn settles into Mason's house.
